description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux AArch64 that runs on pushes to master, pull requests to master, published releases, and workflow dispatches. The workflow should build and package a project for Linux AArch64 architecture. It should use an ubuntu-20.04 environment, checkout the code, create a build environment, build the project with CMake, package it, and upload the package as an artifact. If the workflow is triggered by a release event, update the release with the package.
